title: Senior Teacher - Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech Consulting Pvt Ltd!
